Create users - Amara, Monteserrat. in lightening step. 

waiting for roles

TimeEntry.Title: create users
TimeEntry.Notes: Edit the roles in the form for users. HHOC.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Camera
TimeEntry.Notes:
ssue: User (Amara Bath) reported that the camera was showing as disabled.

Actions Taken:

  1. Logged into the user’s system remotely.

  2. Checked the camera settings and asked the user to ensure the camera was not physically obstructed.

  3. Instructed the user to check the cap on the camera lens and remove it.

  4. After removing the cap, the camera functioned properly, and the user was able to use it.

Outcome:

  • The issue was resolved once the camera cap was removed.

  • The user confirmed that the camera was working, and the ticket was closed.

Status: Closed

TimeEntry.Title: Duplicate forms -HHOC
TimeEntry.Notes: HHOC forms, duplicated the forms.  check if any form of missing. 3 forms were missing. India team will be create the forms.

TimeEntry.Title: HHOC forms
TimeEntry.Notes: Create user accounts.

TimeEntry.Title: HHCA-Maritza Missing Patches Deployed
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines  HHCA-Maritza. Downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed/missing patches.
Some machines rebooted successfully,

Patches are Inspiron 16 7630 2-in-1 (1.27.0)
Realtek High Definition Audio[INTELAUDIO\\FUNC_01&VEN_10EC&DEV_0295] (6.0.9932.1)
Raptor Lake-P [Iris Xe Graphics][PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_A7A0] (32.0.101.7080)

TimeEntry.Title: Share point Issue
TimeEntry.Notes: "I wanted to see if you could please take a look at the ATCAA folder within our SharePoint Documents library. We are not sure what this is and why it appears. Additionally, is it possible for IT to implement a backup for the full SharePoint site?  We want to ensure we have a recovery option in place in case anything is accidentally deleted or access is disrupted." this issue was solved., Backup solution needs to be provided.

TimeEntry.Title: Share point access for user (Valeria)
TimeEntry.Notes: Valeria williams a user outisde the organization having issues connecting to HHOC sharepoint, user link not opening or misplaced. Checked the permission. tested with my account . change the permission and shared the new link with user.

TimeEntry.Title: Sharepoint access error - Maritza
TimeEntry.Notes:
Maritza informed users having issues with receiving the link for share point. Shared the link with the user Mary, verifed that its working.

SHarepoint had tab called ATCAA, investigated it . it was view filter ATCAA, Removed the filter per request. 

SHarepoint had edit permission for some users outside the organization, changed them to view only.

TimeEntry.Title: Sharepoint access error - Maritza
TimeEntry.Notes: Created proposal to backup sharepoint on Veeam. checked the sharepoint storage, gathered information and shared with MAritza and Buckly.

TimeEntry.Title: Montserrat - Form permission
TimeEntry.Notes:
Montserrat requested to change the form ownership to her name. initially form was under HHOC collaborated library. 

Checked the ownership information, Form was still under the user, But form was added on the group.

Created a duplicate link from the Microsoft form, pasted the link on browser. Created a duplicate file. Synced the file to local application. Make sure its under the users name. Deleted the other form.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.132 on LAPTOP-NK9LD6E3,HHCA-Maritza,DESKTOP-PDULRRL,LAPTOP-H0LRLV42
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines LAPTOP-NK9LD6E3,HHCA-Maritza,DESKTOP-PDULRRL,LAPTOP-H0LRLV42 on is old version V0.14.96. Connected to the machines from manage engine, download and installed the latest version Ver0.14.132. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.
